audit_items.proof_trace: The property is enforced by the server.current_client null-sentinel protocol: (1) server.current_client = c is set at entry; (2) unlinkClient() clears it to NULL if c is freed; (3) processCommand() returns C_ERR (not C_OK) at line 3367 when server.current_client becomes NULL after freeMemoryIfNeededAndSafe(), preventing execution of the c-dereferencing block at lines 1574-1584; (4) the post-loop guard at line 1594 uses short-circuit &&, so c->querybuf is never accessed when current_client is NULL. For externally-reachable normal clients, c is not in server.slaves, so flushSlavesOutputBuffers() cannot free it and no UAF path exists.
